title: Curated Links & Further Study
subtitle: Trusted sources for deeper study
meta_description: Curated, trusted external resources on Sri Ramana Maharshi and Arunachala: Sri Ramanasramam, David Godman, Arunachala Ashrama, and the Paul Brunton Foundation.
body_html:
Trusted external sources for deeper study of Ramana Maharshi, Arunachala, and the saints of Tiruvannamalai.

  • Sri Ramanasramam — The official ashram of Sri Ramana Maharshi at Tiruvannamalai — texts, teachings, and the Mountain Path journal.
  • David Godman — Extensive articles and books on Ramana Maharshi and his devotees by one of the foremost writers on his life and teaching.
  • Arunachala Ashrama (USA) — North American centre devoted to Ramana Maharshi; hosts archives and the Maharshi newsletter.
  • Paul Brunton Philosophic Foundation — The notebooks and legacy of Paul Brunton, who introduced Ramana Maharshi to the West.

This is a starter list. Add your own trusted links here or through the admin panel.
notes: The .in page was broken (Framer CMS error); seeded a starter list from the report's authoritative sources.
